name: Crowd-pleasin' Cod Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach fish (see Easy Poached Fish recipe). Flake into small pieces; set aside.
2. In a medium saucepan over medium heat, melt butter. Stir in flour, dry mustard, and cayenne pepper.
3. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until the mixture is smooth.
4. Add Worcestershire sauce and continue cooking over medium heat until thickened.
5. Gradually stir about 1/2 cup of hot mixture into eggs; return to the saucepan.
6. Continue cooking for 1 minute more, stirring constantly.
7. Add cheese; stir until melted.
8. Stir in fish; heat through.
9. Place toasted muffin halves on a baking sheet.
10. Top each with tomato slice.
11. Broil 3 to 4 inches from the source of heat for 1 minute.
12. Remove to serving plates; top with sauce.
13. Garnish with parsley. Serve immediately.
